import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 20, 
    'description': 'v20 reactive heuristic (tuned for persistence: detector>0.05 or dist<4 triggers follow at base 0.25 speed-match +0.08*err clipped [0.15,0.45], angular_k=-8.0, pure-rotate >0.4rad (~23deg), aligned safe linear=0.22; OA/backup only if detector<0.25+min_front<1.1 (left/right bias from sliced depth); seek=0.85 when far; backup <0.8m. Uses exact config success_angle/follow_thresh, manual safe+streak tracking, full JSON with per-epi diagnostics. Improved from v19\'s 63 safe/streak; targets longer maintenance on dynamic humanoid for >=500 safe in some eps.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v20 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v20 refines follow gains/speed-match (0.22-0.25), pure-rotate threshold, OA detector gating, depth valid=0.04 for better human avoidance and streak extension.')
